case_title: PACIFIC EMPLOYERS INSURANCE COMPANY VS. RENSTROM PLUMBING & HEATING INC et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 50, INCL.
